clusters.justification: These terms collectively represent the processing of emotional valence, physiological arousal, and subjective mood states mapped primarily to salience and corticolimbic co-activation patterns.
These concepts form a macroscopic functional axis centered on reinforcement learning, incentive computation, and cost-benefit decision-making anchored in striatal and frontomedial circuitries.
These terms encompass the internally directed processing of self-referential information, person perception, and interpersonal abstraction that robustly recruits the default mode network.
